title: Verilation issues with virtual tasks when inherting across packages

features.name: virtual_task_override_with_wait_across_packages
features.description: Code should include a virtual task defined in a base class in one package, with a derived class in a different package overriding it using wait (which makes it a coroutine with VlCoroutine return type)

features.name: virtual_task_inheritance_across_packages
features.description: Code should include class inheritance of virtual tasks across different packages where base class is in one package and derived class imports it

features.name: wait_in_virtual_task_override
features.description: Code should include a virtual task override that uses wait statement to create a coroutine, overriding a base class task that does not use wait
